name: Chick-Pea and Red-Pepper Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can chickpeas, rinsed and drained (16 oz.)
1 jar roasted red peppers, rinsed and drained (7 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a food processor or blender.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Makes 2 cups. Each serving contains 26 calories and 0.2 grams of fat.
